title: Mine 'n' Shine - Reloaded
description:
A modpack, trying to resemble Actions & Stuff modification in java, with addition of some features. 

Not affiliated with Actions & Stuff creator in any matter.
body:
### 🧨 **Mine 'n' Shine**

> This pack was created for Java Edition players who want to recreate an experience similar to the well-known Actions & Stuff pack from Bedrock Edition. The main focus is on immersion, aesthetics and a realistic atmosphere - without unnecessary changes to the game mechanics.

> **There will be a YT video here soon, regarding installation and all features.**

🔧 **Loader required:** Fabric  
🎯 **Minecraft version:** 1.21.5, 1.21.6 or 1.21.11
